columns.description: Lowercase SHA-256 of the immutable decision payload under s7_cross_market_adjudication_id_v1.
columns.name: cross_market_adjudication_id

columns.description: Stable append-only series ID derived from cross_market_subject_id; canonical target, interval, and source-row revisions remain in one series.
columns.name: cross_market_series_id

columns.description: Positive contiguous decision version within the series.
columns.name: decision_version

columns.description: Immediate predecessor ID; null exactly for version 1.
columns.name: supersedes_cross_market_adjudication_id

columns.description: Stable digest of provider, market, locale, ticker, Share Class, and observed foreign Composite; decision revisions cannot change subject.
columns.name: cross_market_subject_id

columns.description: Version-specific digest of subject, disposition, nullable canonical target, validity, source release, candidate manifest, and exact source-row scope.
columns.name: cross_market_scope_id

columns.description: Exact provider namespace; massive for the reviewed groups.
columns.name: provider_id

columns.description: Exact provider market; stocks for the reviewed groups.
columns.name: provider_market

columns.description: Exact provider locale; fixed us for this registry.
columns.name: provider_locale

columns.description: Exact case-sensitive provider ticker; no global aliasing or normalization.
columns.name: observed_ticker

columns.description: Externally corroborated Share Class FIGI shared by the foreign and canonical US Composite FIGIs.
columns.name: share_class_figi

columns.description: Exact provider-observed non-US Composite FIGI retained unchanged in source and derived observed columns.
columns.name: observed_foreign_composite_figi

columns.description: Frozen identifier-authority market code for the observed foreign Composite; never US.
columns.name: observed_composite_market_code

columns.description: Independently evidenced US Composite target for confirmed contamination; null for cross_market_adjudicated_unresolved.
columns.name: canonical_us_composite_figi

columns.description: US for confirmed contamination; null for cross_market_adjudicated_unresolved.
columns.name: canonical_composite_market_code

columns.description: Deterministic asset ID for the canonical target; null for cross_market_adjudicated_unresolved.
columns.name: canonical_asset_id

columns.description: First S4 session eligible for exact foreign-observation matching.
columns.name: valid_from_session

columns.description: Last inclusive S4 session eligible for exact foreign-observation matching.
columns.name: valid_through_session

columns.description: Count of exact S4 source records in this immutable scope.
columns.name: scoped_source_record_count

columns.description: Digest of sorted unique exact S4 source_record_ids.
columns.name: scoped_source_record_set_digest

columns.description: Canonical JSON array of sorted unique exact S4 source_record_ids.
columns.name: scoped_source_record_ids_json

columns.description: Count of preserved bounce cases linked as lineage; may be zero for long-lived non-bounce contamination.
columns.name: related_identity_case_count

columns.description: Canonical JSON array of preserved identity_case_ids; no case is rewritten.
columns.name: related_identity_case_ids_json

columns.description: Canonical JSON object assigning contaminated_middle_episode or inverse_middle_is_canonical_us to each linked case.
columns.name: related_identity_case_roles_json

columns.description: Exact domain confirmed_provider_contamination or cross_market_adjudicated_unresolved; genuine transitions remain in the episode registry.
columns.name: identity_disposition

columns.description: True only for confirmed contamination; false for a withdrawal to unresolved and for correct inverse US observations.
columns.name: canonical_override

columns.description: canonical_research_identity_only for confirmed contamination or none_unresolved for withdrawal.
columns.name: identity_effect

columns.description: Fixed none; identity quality never changes membership.
columns.name: membership_effect

columns.description: Fixed none; contamination is not inactive or delisted.
columns.name: active_status_effect

columns.description: Always false; the registry cannot force liquidation.
columns.name: identity_quality_liquidation_signal

columns.description: Reviewed machine-readable decision reason.
columns.name: reason_code

columns.description: Reviewed human-readable reason without outcome or backtest evidence.
columns.name: reason_detail

columns.description: Fixed approved in a published registry; proposals never enter DATA.
columns.name: approval_status

columns.description: Immutable literal-approval request event ID.
columns.name: approval_request_event_id

columns.description: SHA-256 of exact request-event bytes.
columns.name: approval_request_event_sha256

columns.description: Immutable row-specific literal human approval receipt ID.
columns.name: approval_receipt_id

columns.description: Content-addressed relative path to the exact approval receipt.
columns.name: approval_receipt_path

columns.description: SHA-256 of exact approval receipt bytes.
columns.name: approval_receipt_sha256

columns.description: Exact approved reviewer identity from the receipt.
columns.name: approved_by

columns.description: UTC approval timestamp from the immutable receipt.
columns.name: approved_at_utc

columns.description: First XNYS session on which the exact approval was available.
columns.name: approval_available_session

columns.description: Maximum of candidate, evidence, and approval availability.
columns.name: adjudication_available_session

columns.description: Exact fixed S4/S5/S6 six-release binding ID.
columns.name: source_six_release_binding_id

columns.description: Exact S4 release-set ID used by every scoped source row.
columns.name: source_s4_release_set_id

columns.description: Exact preserved bounce-case candidate manifest ID; may contain related and unrelated cases.
columns.name: source_identity_case_candidate_manifest_id

columns.description: SHA-256 of exact preserved bounce-case candidate manifest bytes.
columns.name: source_identity_case_candidate_manifest_sha256

columns.description: Exact full-sequence market-consistency candidate manifest ID.
columns.name: source_identity_market_consistency_candidate_manifest_id

columns.description: SHA-256 of exact full-sequence market-consistency candidate manifest bytes.
columns.name: source_identity_market_consistency_candidate_manifest_sha256

columns.description: First XNYS session on which all linked candidate scope was available.
columns.name: candidate_available_session

columns.description: Immutable external-evidence manifest ID binding raw OpenFIGI and official action-date bytes.
columns.name: source_external_evidence_manifest_id

columns.description: SHA-256 of exact external-evidence manifest bytes.
columns.name: source_external_evidence_manifest_sha256

columns.description: First XNYS session on which all frozen external evidence was available.
columns.name: external_evidence_available_session

columns.description: Digest of exact response pointers, hierarchy assertions, and official action-date assertions used by the decision.
columns.name: evidence_claim_digest

columns.description: Fixed s7_openfigi_cross_market_relationship_v1.
columns.name: market_classification_rule_version

columns.name: scope_match_rule_version

columns.description: Fixed s7_cross_market_adjudication_id_v1.
columns.name: cross_market_adjudication_id_rule_version

columns.description: Always false; returns, factors, and backtests cannot adjudicate identity.
columns.name: outcome_or_backtest_evidence_used

columns.description: Exact immutable XNYS calendar artifact ID.
columns.name: availability_calendar_id

columns.name: availability_calendar_sha256

columns.description: Fixed max_candidate_evidence_approval_first_xnys_open_v1.
columns.name: availability_rule

description: Protected append-only registry of approved provider/locale/ticker/Share-Class cross-market identity decisions. Stable subjects may revise canonical target, interval, source rows, or withdraw to unresolved without rewriting history. It retains raw observed FIGIs and cannot affect foreign-locale records, active status, membership, or liquidation.
grain: One immutable approved decision version for one exact cross-market scope; nine reviewed tickers would produce nine series, not nineteen bounce-case decisions.

qa_rules.description: Output fields, order, Arrow types, and nullability exactly match this contract.
Published rows cannot be updated or deleted; revisions append a successor.
Versions start at one, are contiguous, reference the immediate predecessor, and may change only version-specific decision scope.
Every stable subject ID reproduces from provider, market, locale, ticker, Share Class, and observed foreign Composite.
Every version-specific scope ID reproduces from subject, disposition, nullable canonical target, interval, candidate, release, and source rows.
Every series ID reproduces from its stable subject ID.
Every decision ID reproduces from its immutable logical payload.
Registry rows require the exact approved provider, stocks market, and us locale.
Both Composite FIGIs, the shared Share Class FIGI, and US/non-US market codes must be valid.
Confirmed contamination requires evidenced same-Share-Class US/foreign targets; unresolved withdrawal requires null canonical fields.
Validity bounds must be ordered and contain every scoped source record.
Exact source-record count, sorted JSON, and digest must reconcile.
Every scoped row and control artifact must use the exact approved S4 and six-release bindings.
The exact full-sequence candidate ID, SHA, cases, reasons, and availability must validate.
Every raw request/response/page path, byte count, SHA, assertion pointer, and availability must replay.
Linked cases remain unchanged and may only carry contaminated-middle or inverse-US roles.
Request event and receipt must bind this exact version and human approval.
Adjudication availability must equal the maximum of candidate, evidence, and approval availability.
After terminal-head selection per stable subject, no source record may match two effective subjects at one cutoff.
Only approved rows may enter a published registry.
Confirmed contamination requires canonical override=true and a US target; adjudicated unresolved requires null target, override=false, and no identity effect.
Cross-market identity quality cannot alter active/inactive or membership.
Cross-market identity quality cannot trigger forced liquidation.
Outcome or backtest evidence is prohibited.
